title: Mustard!!!
description: This project adds a custom totem that plays MUSTARD when activated and an new creeper explode sound effect.Also the music disc Pig step is changed to a Kendricklamar version.For more details look at the pictures.
body:
This is a fun addon to download for a more active experience.
When you pop the totem it plays the iconic mustard meme sound.
I hope you enjoy this fun little adon to the game and keep it
as humor.

By Milproo
